items.title: Local service connection troubleshooting
items.suggestion: Check whether service is started, verify port mapping, then retry after health check.

items.title: Webhook user_id undefined quick fix
items.suggestion: Add payload schema validation before parsing and fallback mapping for missing user context.

items.title: Meeting action items to task sync
items.suggestion: Extract owner/deadline from minutes, create tasks in batch, and post summary card to project group.
